title: ctenodon mucronulatus
intro: Ctenodon mucronulatus, also known as the 'prickly pear yam', is a type of plant that belongs to the yam family (Dioscoreaceae) and is native to tropical Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ctenodon mucronulatus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and is often used in conjunction with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
